title: Empty Office Room Tone
author: richwise
modifications: Fetched the public hq.mp3 preview from the Freesound CDN. Recording of an empty office before anyone arrives — exactly the persona brief ('empty newsroom at 2am'). NOTE: there is a faint periodic beep from office equipment every few seconds — recommend EQ-notching the beep frequency or selecting a beep-free stretch when looping. Normalize to -36 dB.
